channel.title: GitHub Shell Weekly Trending
channel.description: Weekly Trending of Shell in GitHub

item.title: nvm-sh/nvm
item.description: Node Version Manager - POSIX-compliant bash script to manage multiple active node.js versions

item.title: OpenBMB/ChatDev
item.description: Create Customized Software using Natural Language Idea (through LLM-powered Multi-Agent Collaboration)

item.title: SeleniumHQ/docker-selenium
item.description: Provides a simple way to run Selenium Grid with Chrome, Firefox, and Edge using Docker, making it easier to perform browser automation

item.title: ohmyzsh/ohmyzsh
item.description: 🙃 A delightful community-driven (with 2,400+ contributors) framework for managing your zsh configuration. Includes 300+ optional plugins (rails, git, macOS, hub, docker, homebrew, node, php, python, etc), 140+ themes to spice up your morning, and an auto-update tool that makes it easy to keep up with the latest updates from the community.

item.title: ublue-os/bazzite
item.description: Bazzite is a cloud native image built upon Fedora Atomic Desktops that brings the best of Linux gaming to all of your devices - including your favorite handheld.

item.title: beclab/Olares
item.description: Olares: An Open-Source Sovereign Cloud OS for Local AI

item.title: ai-dock/comfyui
item.description: ComfyUI docker images for use in GPU cloud and local environments. Includes AI-Dock base for authentication and improved user experience.

item.title: winapps-org/winapps
item.description: Run Windows apps such as Microsoft Office/Adobe in Linux (Ubuntu/Fedora) and GNOME/KDE as if they were a part of the native OS, including Nautilus integration. Hard fork of https://github.com/Fmstrat/winapps/

item.title: wolfi-dev/os
item.description: Main package repository for production Wolfi images
